englishDefinitions: A follow-up work, such as a movie or book, connected to Forrest Gump.
A later story continuing or referring to the film Forrest Gump.
persianTranslation: قسمت بعدی مربوط به فارست گامپ
examples: Fans often ask whether there will ever be a sequel to Forrest Gump.
The writer once discussed ideas for a sequel to Forrest Gump.
A sequel to Forrest Gump would have to match the original film's popularity.
